document.description: Telemetry Specification (PMU Events, Metrics and Methodology) for C1-SME2 processor

INST_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed
INST_SPEC.description: Counts instructions that have been speculatively executed.

SSVE_INST_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE, including load and store
SSVE_INST_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each instruction counted by SVE_INST_SPEC when the CPU executes in
Streaming mode.

SSVE_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE
SSVE_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by SVE_SPEC specifically in Streaming
mode.

SSVE_LDST_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE load, store, or prefetch
SSVE_LDST_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Load or Store operation counted by `SVE_LDST_SPEC` when CPU
executes in Streaming mode

SSVE_LD_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE load
SSVE_LD_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Load operation counted by `SVE_LD_SPEC` when CPU
executes in Streaming mode

SSVE_ST_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE store
SSVE_ST_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Store operation counted by `SVE_ST_SPEC` when CPU
executes in Streaming mode

SSVE_INT_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE integer
SSVE_INT_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed integer arithmetic operation due to an SVE
data-processing instruction listed in SVE integer instructions.

This counter only counts operations executed in Streaming mode.

SSVE_FP_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE floating-point
SSVE_FP_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed floating-point operation due
to an SVE instruction, specifically in streaming mode.

SSVE_INT8_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE 8-bit integer
SSVE_INT8_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by SSVE_INT_SPEC where the largest type is 8-bit
integer.

SSVE_INT16_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE 16-bit integer
SSVE_INT16_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by SSVE_INT_SPEC where the largest type is 16-bit
integer.

SSVE_INT32_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE 32-bit integer
SSVE_INT32_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by SSVE_INT_SPEC where the largest type is 32-bit
integer.

SSVE_INT64_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE 64-bit integer
SSVE_INT64_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by SSVE_INT_SPEC where the largest type is 64-bit
integer.

SSVE_FP_HP_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE half-precision floating-point
SSVE_FP_HP_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed half-precision floating-point operation due
to an SVE instruction, specifically in streaming mode.

SSVE_FP_BF16_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE BFloat16 floating-point
SSVE_FP_BF16_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed BFloat16 floating-point operation due
to an SVE instruction, specifically in streaming mode.

SSVE_FP_SP_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE single-precision floating-point
SSVE_FP_SP_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed single-precision floating-point operation due
to an SVE instruction, specifically in streaming mode.

SSVE_FP_DP_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE double-precision floating-point
SSVE_FP_DP_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed double-precision floating-point operation due
to an SVE instruction, specifically in streaming mode.

SSVE_INT_MUL_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE integer multiply or multiply-accumulate
SSVE_INT_MUL_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed integer multiply or multiply-accumulate operation
counted by SSVE_INT_SPEC, specifically in Streaming mode, due to any of the following instructions:

- SVE: MAD, MLA, MLS, MSB, MUL, SMULH, or UMULH.
- SVE2: CMLA, MLA, MLS, MUL, PMUL, SMLALB, SMLALT, SMLSLB, SMLSLT, SMULH, SMULLB, SMULLT,
  SQDMLALB, SQDMLALBT, SQDMLALT, SQDMLSLB, SQDMLSLBT, SQDMLSLT, SQDMULH, SQDMULLB, SQDMULLT,
  SQRDCMLAH, SQRDMLAH, SQRDMLSH, SQRDMULH, UMLALB, UMLALT, UMLSLB, UMLSLT, UMULH, UMULLB, or
  UMULLT.

SSVE_INT_DOT_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE integer dot product
SSVE_INT_DOT_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each integer dot product operation counted by ASE_SVE_INT_DOT_SPEC
due to any of the following instructions:

- SVE: SDOT, SUDOT, UDOT, or USDOT.
- SVE2: CDOT, SUDOT, or USDOT.

SSVE_FP_ADDSUB_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE floating-point add or subtract
SSVE_FP_ADDSUB_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed floating-point add or subtract operation counted by
SSVE_FP_SPEC due to any of the following instructions:

- SVE: FABD, FADD, FSUB, or FSUBR.

SSVE_FP_MUL_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE floating-point multiply
SSVE_FP_MUL_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed floating-point multiply operation counted by
SSVE_FP_SPEC due to any of the following instructions:

-  SVE: FMUL, FMULX, or FTSMUL.

SSVE_FP_FMA_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE floating-point multiply-add or multiply-subtract
SSVE_FP_FMA_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed floating-point fused multiply-add or
multiply-subtract operation counted by FP_FMA_SPEC, specifically in Streaming mode,
due to any of the following instructions:

- SVE: BFMLALB (vectors), BFMLALT (vectors), FCMLA (vectors), FMAD, FMLA (vectors), FMLS
  (vectors), FMSB, FNMAD, FNMLA, FNMLS, FNMSB, or FTMAD.
- SVE2: BFMLALB (vectors), BFMLALT (vectors), FMLALB (vectors), FMLALT (vectors), FMLSLB
  (vectors), or FMLSLT (vectors).

SSVE_FP_DOT_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE floating-point dot product
SSVE_FP_DOT_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each dot-product operation counted by SSVE_FP_SPEC due to any
of the following instructions:

- SVE: BFDOT.
- SVE2: BFDOT.

SSVE_FP_SQRT_SPEC.title: Floating-point operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE square root
SSVE_FP_SQRT_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed floating-point square-root operation counted by
SSVE_FP_SPEC, specifically in Streaming mode, due to any of the following instructions:

- SVE: FSQRT.

SSVE_FP_DIV_SPEC.title: Floating-point operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE divide
SSVE_FP_DIV_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed floating-point divide operation counted by
FP_DIV_SPEC, specifically in Streaming mode, due to any of the following instructions:

- SVE: FDIV or FDIVR.

SSVE_FP_RECPE_SPEC.title: Floating-point operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE reciprocal estimate
SSVE_FP_RECPE_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed floating-point reciprocal estimate operation
counted by SSVE_FP_SPEC, specifically in Streaming mode, due to any of the following instructions:

- SVE: FRECPE or FRSQRTE.

SSVE_FP_CVT_SPEC.title: Floating-point operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE convert
SSVE_FP_CVT_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed floating-point convert operation counted by
SSVE_FP_SPEC, specifically in Streaming mode, due to an SVE instruction.

SSVE_FP_VREDUCE_SPEC.title: Floating-point operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE vector reduction
SSVE_FP_VREDUCE_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed floating-point treewise reduction operation counted
by SSVE_FP_SPEC, specifically in Streaming mode, due to any of the following A64 instructions:

- SVE: FADDV, FMAXNMV, FMAXV, FMINNMV, or FMINV.

SSVE_PRED_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE predicated
SSVE_PRED_SPEC.description:
Counts operations counted by SVE_PRED_SPEC, but in Streaming mode only.

Note: this counts SME operations requiring PSTATE.ZA to be set, including 2D operations.

SSVE_PRED_EMPTY_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE predicated with no active predicates
SSVE_PRED_EMPTY_SPEC.description: Counts operations counted by SVE_PRED_EMPTY_SPEC, but in Streaming mode only.

SSVE_PRED_FULL_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE predicated with all active predicates
SSVE_PRED_FULL_SPEC.description:
Counts speculatively executed predicated SVE operations with all
predicate elements active, specifically in Streaming mode.

SSVE_PRED_NOT_FULL_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE predicated with no active or partially active predicates
SSVE_PRED_NOT_FULL_SPEC.description:
Counts speculatively executed predicated SVE operations with at least
one non active predicate elements, specifically in Streaming mode.

SSVE_PRED_PARTIAL_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE predicated with partially active predicates
SSVE_PRED_PARTIAL_SPEC.description:
Counts speculatively executed predicated SVE operations with at least
one but not all active predicate elements, specifically in streaming
mode.

SSVE_FP_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable floating-point element ALU operations speculatively executed in Streaming SVE
SSVE_FP_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Streaming SVE floating-point ALU operation counted by
SSVE_FP_SPEC that was speculatively executed.

The counter increments by the number of numerical operations carried out by the instruction per
128/element_size of the result.

SSVE_FP_HP_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable half-precision floating-point element ALU operations in Streaming mode
SSVE_FP_HP_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Streaming SVE floating-point half-precision ALU operation counted by
`SSVE_FP_SPEC` that was speculatively executed.

The counter increments by the number of numerical operations carried out by the instruction per
128/element_size of the result.

SSVE_FP_BF16_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable BFloat16 floating-point element ALU operations in Streaming SVE
SSVE_FP_BF16_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Streaming SVE floating-point BFloat16 ALU operation counted by
`SSVE_FP_SPEC` that was speculatively executed.

The counter increments by the number of numerical operations carried out by the instruction per
128/element_size of the result.

SSVE_FP_SP_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable single-precision floating-point element ALU operations in Streaming SVE
SSVE_FP_SP_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Streaming SVE floating-point single-precision ALU operation counted by
`SSVE_FP_SPEC` that was speculatively executed.

The counter increments by the number of numerical operations carried out by the instruction per
128/element_size of the result.

SSVE_FP_DP_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable double-precision floating-point element ALU operations in Streaming SVE
SSVE_FP_DP_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Streaming SVE floating-point double-precision ALU operation counted by
`SSVE_FP_SPEC` that was speculatively executed.

The counter increments by the number of numerical operations carried out by the instruction per
128/element_size of the result.

SSVE_INT_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable integer element ALU operations Speculatively executed in Streaming SVE
SSVE_INT_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Streaming SVE integer ALU operation counted by
`SSVE_INT_SPEC` that was speculatively executed.

The counter increments by the number of numerical operations carried out by the instruction per
128/element_size of the result.

SSVE_LDST_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable load or store element Operations speculatively executed in Streaming SVE
SSVE_LDST_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed Memory-read operation or Memory-write operation due to either:

- An SVE predicated vector load or store instruction other than a replicating LD1R or LD1RQ instruction.
- An SME vector load or store instruction

The counter increments by the number of elements accessed by the instruction per `128/element_size` vector
of the result.

SSVE_LD_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable load element Operations speculatively executed in Streaming SVE
SSVE_LD_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed Memory-read operation due to either:

- An SVE predicated vector load instruction other than a replicating LD1R or LD1RQ instruction.
- An SME vector load instruction

The counter increments by the number of elements accessed by the instruction per 128/element_size vector
of the result.

SSVE_ST_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable store element Operations speculatively executed in Streaming SVE
SSVE_ST_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed Memory-store operation due to either:

- An SVE predicated vector store instruction.
- An SME vector store instruction

The counter increments by the number of elements accessed by the instruction per 128/element_size vector
of the result.

SSVE_LDST_SCALE_BYTES_SPEC.title: Scalable load and store bytes Speculatively executed in Streaming SVE
SSVE_LDST_SCALE_BYTES_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed Memory-read operation or Memory-write operation due to either:

- An SVE predicated vector load or store instruction other than a replicating LD1R or LD1RQ instruction.
- An SME vector load or store instruction

For each instruction, the counter is incremented by `(16 / (CSIZE / MSIZE))`, multiplied by the number of transferred
vector registers.

SSVE_LD_SCALE_BYTES_SPEC.title: Scalable load bytes Speculatively executed in Streaming SVE
SSVE_LD_SCALE_BYTES_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed Memory-read operation due to either:

- An SVE predicated vector load instruction other than a replicating LD1R or LD1RQ instruction.
- An SME vector load instruction

For each instruction, the counter is incremented by `(16 / (CSIZE / MSIZE))`, multiplied by the number of transferred
vector registers.

SSVE_ST_SCALE_BYTES_SPEC.title: Scalable store bytes Speculatively executed in Streaming SVE
SSVE_ST_SCALE_BYTES_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed Memory-write operation due to either:

- An SVE predicated vector store instruction.
- An SME vector store instruction

For each instruction, the counter is incremented by `(16 / (CSIZE / MSIZE))`, multiplied by the number of transferred
vector registers.

SSVE_LDST_FIXED_BYTES_SPEC.title: Non-scalable load and store bytes Speculatively executed in Streaming SVE
SSVE_LDST_FIXED_BYTES_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each byte speculatively read or written in SVE streaming due to any of:

- Any Advanced SIMD or SVE non-vector load or store operation.
- An SVE replicating LD1R or LD1RQ instruction.

For each instruction, the counter is incremented by the number of bytes transferred per register multiplied by
the number of registers transferred multiplied by the number of transfers made per register. For example, the
counter counts bytes as follows:

- SVE and Advanced SIMD LD1R instructions increment the counter by `(MSIZE / 8)`.
- SVELD1RQ instructions increment the counter by 16.

CME_CYCLES.title: SME2 unit clock cycles
CME_CYCLES.description:
Counts SME2 unit clock cycles (not timer cycles). The clock measured by
this event is defined as the physical clock driving the SME2 unit.

CME_INST_RETIRED.title: SME Instruction architecturally executed
CME_INST_RETIRED.description:
Counts instructions that have been architecturally executed inside the
SME2 unit.

CME_OP_RETIRED.title: SME Micro-operation architecturally executed
CME_OP_RETIRED.description:
Counts micro-operations that are architecturally executed. This is a count of
number of micro-operations retired from the commit queue in a single cycle.

CME_STALL.title: No operation sent for execution inside SME2 unit
CME_STALL.description:
Counts cycles when no operations are sent in the SME2 unit to the rename from
the frontend or from the rename to the backend for
any reason (either frontend or backend stall).

CME_STALL_FRONTEND.title: No operation sent for execution due to the SME2 unit frontend
CME_STALL_FRONTEND.description:
No operation has been issued, because of the frontend.
The counter counts on any cycle when no operations are issued while instruction queues are not full.

CME_STALL_FRONTEND_CPU.title: SME2 unit front-end stall due to arbitrated core not sending instructions
CME_STALL_FRONTEND_CPU.description:
The counter counts cycles when CME_STALL_FRONTEND increments, due to not enough instructions being
sent by the CPU.

CME_STALL_FRONTEND_OTHER_CPU.title: SME2 unit front-end stall due to non-arbitrated cores
CME_STALL_FRONTEND_OTHER_CPU.description:
The counter counts cycles when CME_STALL_FRONTEND increments, due to instructions received by
another CPU in the system.

CME_STALL_BACKEND.title: No operation sent for execution in the SME2 unit due to the backend
CME_STALL_BACKEND.description:
Counts cycles whenever the rename unit in the SME2 unit is unable to send any micro-operations
to the backend of the pipeline because of backend resource constraints.
Backend resource constraints can include issue stage fullness, execution stage
fullness, or other internal pipeline resource fullness.

CME_STALL_BACKEND_CORE.title: SME2 unit backend stall due to the execution units
CME_STALL_BACKEND_CORE.description:
Counts cycles when CME_STALL_BACKEND is set, due to DP issue queues not
accepting instructions.

CME_STALL_BACKEND_MEM.title: SME2 unit backend stall due to the memory system
CME_STALL_BACKEND_MEM.description:
Counts cycles when CME_STALL_BACKEND is set, due to Load-Store issue queues not
accepting instructions.

CME_STALL_BACKEND_PF.title: SME2 unit backend stall due to the prefetcher
CME_STALL_BACKEND_PF.description:
Counts cycles when CME_STALL_BACKEND is set, due to prefetcher issue queues not
accepting instructions.

CME_STALL_BACKEND_MEM_CACHE.title: SME2 unit memory system stall due to the cache pipelines
CME_STALL_BACKEND_MEM_CACHE.description:
Counts cycles when CME_STALL_BACKEND_MEM is set, with the oldest instruction
in at least one of the load issue queues waiting for cache arbitration.

CME_STALL_BACKEND_MEM_STORE.title: SME2 unit memory system stall due to store backpressure
CME_STALL_BACKEND_MEM_STORE.description:
Counts cycles when CME_STALL_BACKEND_MEM is set, with the oldest instruction
in at least one of the store issue queues waiting for the merge buffer.

CME_LDST_SPEC.title: SME Operation speculatively executed, load or store
CME_LDST_SPEC.description: Counts load and store operations that have been speculatively executed.

CME_LD_SPEC.title: SME Operation speculatively executed, load
CME_LD_SPEC.description:
Counts speculatively executed SME load operations including Single Instruction
Multiple Data (SIMD) load operations executed in streaming SVE mode.

CME_UNALIGNED_LDST_SPEC.title: SME Operation speculatively executed, unaligned load or store
CME_UNALIGNED_LDST_SPEC.description:
Counts unaligned memory operations issued by the CPU. This event
counts unaligned accesses (as defined by the actual instruction), even if
they are subsequently issued as multiple aligned accesses.

CME_LDST_ALIGN_LAT.title: SME2 unit access with additional latency from alignment
CME_LDST_ALIGN_LAT.description:
Counts the number of memory read and write accesses in a cycle that
incurred additional latency, due to the alignment of the address and the
size of data being accessed, which results in store crossing a single cache
line.

CME_UNALIGNED_LD_SPEC.title: SME Operation speculatively executed, unaligned load
CME_UNALIGNED_LD_SPEC.description:
Counts unaligned memory read operations issued by the CPU. This
event counts unaligned accesses (as defined by the actual instruction),
even if they are subsequently issued as multiple aligned accesses. The event
does not count preload operations (PLD, PLI).

CME_LD_ALIGN_LAT.title: SME load access with additional latency from alignment
CME_LD_ALIGN_LAT.description:
Counts the number of memory read accesses in a cycle that incurred
additional latency, due to the alignment of the address and size of data
being accessed, which results in load crossing a single cache line.

CME_ST_SPEC.title: SME Operation speculatively executed, store
CME_ST_SPEC.description:
Counts speculatively executed SME store operations including Single Instruction
Multiple Data (SIMD) load operations executed in streaming SVE mode.

CME_UNALIGNED_ST_SPEC.title: SME Operation speculatively executed, unaligned store
CME_UNALIGNED_ST_SPEC.description:
Counts unaligned memory write operations issued by the CPU. This
event counts unaligned accesses (as defined by the actual instruction),
even if they are subsequently issued as multiple aligned accesses.

CME_ST_ALIGN_LAT.title: SME2 unit store access with additional latency from alignment
CME_ST_ALIGN_LAT.description:
Counts the number of memory write accesses in a cycle that
incurred additional latency, due to the alignment of the address and the
size of data being accessed, which results in store crossing a single cache
line.

CME_PRF_SPEC.title: SME operation speculatively executed, Prefetch
CME_PRF_SPEC.description:
Counts speculatively executed operations in Streaming SVE mode that
prefetch memory, executed by the SME2 unit.

Only the SME RPRFM instructions are counted by this event.

CME_DISPATCH_STALL_IQ_DP0.title: SME2 unit dispatch stalled due to IQ full, DP0
CME_DISPATCH_STALL_IQ_DP0.description:
Count cycles counted by CME_STALL_BACKEND when at least one operation should
be sent to Issue Queue DP0, and this issue queue is full.

CME_DISPATCH_STALL_IQ_DP1.title: SME2 unit dispatch stalled due to IQ full, DP1
CME_DISPATCH_STALL_IQ_DP1.description:
Count cycles counted by CME_STALL_BACKEND when at least one operation should
be sent to Issue Queue DP1, and this issue queue is full.

CME_DISPATCH_STALL_IQ_LD.title: SME2 unit dispatch stalled due to IQ full, Load queue
CME_DISPATCH_STALL_IQ_LD.description:
Count cycles counted by CME_STALL_BACKEND when at least one operation should
be sent to Issue Queue LD, and this issue queue is full.

CME_OP_ALU_ISSUE.title: SME2 unit ALU operation issued
CME_OP_ALU_ISSUE.description: Count number of operations issued to an ALU execution unit at each cycle.

CME_OP_MAC_ISSUE.title: SME2 unit Multiply-accumulate operation issued
CME_OP_MAC_ISSUE.description: Count number of operations issued to a MAC execution unit at each cycle.

CME_OP_PERM_ISSUE.title: SME2 unit Permutation operation issued
CME_OP_PERM_ISSUE.description: Count number of operations issued to a Permute execution unit at each cycle.

CME_OP_ST_ISSUE.title: SME2 unit Store operation issued
CME_OP_ST_ISSUE.description: Count number of operations issued to a Store execution unit at each cycle.

CME_OP_MMDP_ISSUE.title: SME2 unit Matrix Multiplication Data-processing operation issued
CME_OP_MMDP_ISSUE.description: Count number of operations issued to a Matmul Datapath execution unit at each cycle.

CME_OP_MMMV_ISSUE.title: SME2 unit Matrix Multiplication Move operation issued
CME_OP_MMMV_ISSUE.description: Count number of operations issued to a Matmul Move execution unit at each cycle.

CME_BUS_REQ_RD_PERCYC.title: SME2 unit Bus read transactions in progress
CME_BUS_REQ_RD_PERCYC.description:
Counts memory transaction requests issued by the CPU to the external bus, including snoop
requests and snoop responses in progress on a processor cycle.

CME_BUS_REQ.title: SME2 unit Bus request
CME_BUS_REQ.description:
Counts memory transaction requests issued by the CPU to the external bus, including snoop
requests and snoop responses.

CME_BUS_REQ_RD.title: SME2 unit Bus request, read
CME_BUS_REQ_RD.description:
Counts memory read transaction requests issued by the CPU to the external bus, including snoop
requests and snoop responses.

CME_BUS_REQ_WR.title: SME2 unit Bus request, write
CME_BUS_REQ_WR.description:
Counts memory write transaction requests issued by the CPU to the external bus, including snoop
requests and snoop responses.

CME_BUS_CYCLES.title: SME2 unit Bus cycle
CME_BUS_CYCLES.description:
Counts bus cycles in the SME2 unit. Bus cycles represent a clock cycle
in which a transaction could be sent or received on the interface from the
SME2 unit to the external bus.

CME_BUS_ACCESS.title: SME2 unit Bus access
CME_BUS_ACCESS.description:
Counts memory transactions issued by the SME2 unit to the external
bus, including snoop requests and snoop responses. Each beat of data is
counted individually.

CME_BUS_ACCESS_RD.title: SME2 unit Bus access, read
CME_BUS_ACCESS_RD.description:
Counts memory read transactions seen on the external bus. Each beat
of data is counted individually.

CME_BUS_ACCESS_WR.title: SME2 unit Bus access, write
CME_BUS_ACCESS_WR.description:
Counts memory write transactions seen on the external bus. Each beat
of data is counted individually.

CME_DSNP_HIT.title: SME2 unit Snoop hit
CME_DSNP_HIT.description: This event counts each data snoop that hits in a cache outside of the SME2 unit cache.

CME_L1D_CACHE.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache access
CME_L1D_CACHE.description:
Counts each memory-read operation or memory-write operation that causes a
level 1 data cache accesses.

Each access to a cache line is counted including the multiple accesses
caused by single instructions such as multiple-vector instructions. Each
access to other level 1 data or unified memory structures, for example
refill buffers, write buffers, and write-back buffers, are also
counted.

CME_L1D_CACHE_HIT.title: Level 1 data cache hit, any access
CME_L1D_CACHE_HIT.description: Counts each access counted by L1D_CACHE that hits in the level 1 data cache.

CME_L1D_CACHE_HIT_RW.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache demand hit
CME_L1D_CACHE_HIT_RW.description: Counts cache line hits in the level 1 data cache due to Load or Store operations

CME_L1D_CACHE_HIT_RD.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache demand hit, read
CME_L1D_CACHE_HIT_RD.description: Counts cache line hits in the level 1 data cache due to Load operations

CME_L1D_CACHE_HIT_WR.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache demand hit, write
CME_L1D_CACHE_HIT_WR.description: Counts cache line hits in the level 1 data cache due to Store operations

CME_L1D_CACHE_HIT_RW_FHWPRF.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache demand access first hit, fetched by hardware prefetcher
CME_L1D_CACHE_HIT_RW_FHWPRF.description:
The counter counts each demand access first hit counted by L1D_CACHE_HIT_RW where the cache line was fetched by a hardware prefetcher.
That is, the L1D_CACHE_REFILL_HWPRF event was generated when the cache line was fetched into the cache.
Only the first hit by a demand access is counted.
After this event is generated for a cache line, the event is not generated again for the same cache line while it remains in the cache.

CME_L1D_CACHE_MISS.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache demand access miss
CME_L1D_CACHE_MISS.description: Counts access counted by L1D_CACHE that miss in the level 1 data cache.

CME_L1D_CACHE_RW.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache demand access
CME_L1D_CACHE_RW.description:
Counts level 1 data demand cache accesses from any load or store
operation.

CME_L1D_CACHE_RD.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache demand access, read
CME_L1D_CACHE_RD.description: Counts level 1 data cache accesses from any load operation.

CME_L1D_CACHE_WR.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache demand access, write
CME_L1D_CACHE_WR.description: Counts level 1 data cache accesses generated by store operations.

CME_L1D_CACHE_PRF.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache, preload or prefetch hit
CME_L1D_CACHE_PRF.description:
Counts level 1 data cache accesses from hardware prefetcher, software preload
or prefetch  instructions.

CME_L1D_CACHE_HWPRF.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache hardware prefetch
CME_L1D_CACHE_HWPRF.description:
The counter counts each access counted by L1D_CACHE that is due to a hardware prefetch.
The hardware prefetch is generated by a hardware prefetcher at the Level 1 data or unified cache.

CME_L1D_CACHE_PRFM.title: SME2 unit Level 1 instruction cache software preload
CME_L1D_CACHE_PRFM.description:
Counts level 1 data cache accesses from software preload
or prefetch  instructions.

CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache refill
CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL.description:
Counts each access counted by L1D_CACHE that causes a level 1 data cache refill
due to a miss in the level 1 data cache. This event only counts one event per cache line.

CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL_INNER.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache refill, inner
CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL_INNER.description:
Counts level 1 data cache refills where the cache line data came
from caches inside the immediate cluster of the core.

CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL_OUTER.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache refill, outer
CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL_OUTER.description:
Counts level 1 data cache refills for which the cache line data
came from outside the immediate cluster of the core, like an SLC in the system
interconnect or DRAM.

CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL_RD.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache refill, read
CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL_RD.description:
Counts level 1 data cache refills caused by speculatively executed
load instructions where the memory read operation misses in the level 1 data cache.
This event only counts one event per cache line.

CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL_WR.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache refill, write
CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL_WR.description:
Counts level 1 data cache refills caused by speculatively executed
store instructions where the memory write operation misses in the level 1 data cache.
This event only counts one event per cache line.

CME_L1D_CACHE_INVAL.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache invalidate
CME_L1D_CACHE_INVAL.description:
Counts each explicit invalidation of a cache line in the level 1
data cache caused by broadcast cache coherency operations from another
CPU in the system.

This event does not count for the following conditions:

1. A cache refill invalidates a cache line.
2. Invalidation during hardware power-off sequence.

CME_L1D_CACHE_LMISS_RD.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache long-latency read miss
CME_L1D_CACHE_LMISS_RD.description:
Counts cache line refills into the level 1 data cache from any memory
read operations, that incurred additional latency.

CME_L1D_CACHE_WB.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache write-back
CME_L1D_CACHE_WB.description:
Counts write-backs of dirty data from the L1 data cache to the next
cache. This occurs when either a dirty cache line is evicted from L1 data
cache and allocated in the next cache or dirty data is written to the next cache
and possibly to the next level of cache. This event counts both victim cache
line evictions and cache write-backs from snoops or cache maintenance operations.

The following cache operations are not counted:

1. Invalidations which do not result in data being transferred out of the L1 (such as evictions of clean data),
2. Full line writes which write to next level of cache without writing L1, such as write streaming mode.

CME_L1D_CACHE_WB_CLEAN.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache write-back, cleaning and coherency
CME_L1D_CACHE_WB_CLEAN.description:
Counts write-backs from the level 1 data cache that are a result
of a coherency operation made by another CPU. Event count includes cache
maintenance operations.

CME_L1D_CACHE_WB_VICTIM.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache write-back, victim
CME_L1D_CACHE_WB_VICTIM.description:
Counts dirty cache line evictions from the level 1 data cache caused
by a new cache line allocation. This event does not count evictions caused
by cache maintenance operations.

CME_L3D_CACHE.title: Level 3 data cache access due to the SME2 unit
CME_L3D_CACHE.description:
Counts level 3 cache accesses. Level 3 cache is a unified cache
for data and instruction accesses. Accesses are for misses in the lower
level caches or translation resolutions due to accesses.

CME_L3D_CACHE_RW.title: Level 3 data cache demand access due to the SME2 unit
CME_L3D_CACHE_RW.description:
Counts level 3 cache accesses caused by any memory read or write
operation. level 3 cache is a unified cache for data and instruction accesses.
Accesses are for misses in the lower level caches or translation resolutions
due to accesses.

CME_L3D_CACHE_RD.title: Level 3 data cache demand access due to the SME2 unit, read
CME_L3D_CACHE_RD.description: Sum of L3 cache reads from all Pipelines

CME_L3D_CACHE_WR.title: Level 3 data cache demand access due to the SME2 unit, write

CME_L3D_CACHE_ALLOCATE.title: Level 3 data cache allocation due to the SME2 unit, without refill
CME_L3D_CACHE_ALLOCATE.description:
Counts level 3 cache line allocates that do not fetch data from
outside the level 3 data or unified cache. For example, allocates due to
streaming stores.

CME_L3D_CACHE_LMISS_RD.title: Level 3 data cache long-latency read miss due to the SME2 unit
CME_L3D_CACHE_LMISS_RD.description:
Counts any cache line refill into the level 3 cache from memory read
operations that incurred additional latency.

CME_L3D_CACHE_HIT.title: Level 3 data cache hit due to the SME2 unit
CME_L3D_CACHE_HIT.description: Counts level 3 cache accesses that hit in the level 3 cache.

CME_L3D_CACHE_MISS.title: Level 3 data cache demand access miss due to the SME2 unit
CME_L3D_CACHE_MISS.description: Counts level 3 cache accesses that missed in the level 3 cache.

CME_L3D_CACHE_REFILL.title: Level 3 data cache refill due to the SME2 unit
CME_L3D_CACHE_REFILL.description: Counts level 3 accesses that receive data from outside the L3 cache.

CME_L3D_CACHE_REFILL_PRFM.title: Level 3 data cache refill due to the SME2 unit, software preload
CME_L3D_CACHE_REFILL_PRFM.description:
Counts cacheable reads generated by hardware or software prefetches
that receive data from outside the L3 cache.

CME_L3D_CACHE_REFILL_RD.title: Level 3 data cache refill due to the SME2 unit, read
CME_L3D_CACHE_REFILL_RD.description:
- This event duplicates L3D_CACHE_REFILL.
- If either the core is configured without a per-core L2 or the cluster is configured without an L3 cache, this event is not implemented.

CME_LL_CACHE.title: Last level cache access due to the SME2 unit
CME_LL_CACHE.description:
Counts transactions that were returned from outside the core cluster. This event
counts when the system register CMECFG.EXTLLC bit is set.

CME_LL_CACHE_RD.title: Last level cache access due to the SME2 unit, read
CME_LL_CACHE_RD.description:
Counts read transactions that were returned from outside the core cluster. This event
counts when the system register CMECFG.EXTLLC bit is set. This event counts read
transactions returned from outside the core if those transactions are either hit in the system
level cache or missed in the SLC and are returned from any other external sources.

This event is a superset of the CME_LL_CACHE_MISS_RD event.

CME_LL_CACHE_MISS_RD.title: Last level cache miss due to the SME2 unit
CME_LL_CACHE_MISS_RD.description:
Counts read transactions that were returned from outside the core cluster but missed
in the system level cache. This event counts when the system register CMECFG.EXTLLC
bit is set. This event counts read transactions returned from outside the core if
those transactions are missed in the System level Cache. The data source of the transaction
is indicated by a field in the CHI transaction returning to the CPU.

This event does not  count reads caused by cache maintenance operations.

This event is a subset of the CME_LL_CACHE_RD event.

CME_LL_CACHE_HIT.title: Last level cache hit due to the SME2 unit
CME_LL_CACHE_HIT.description:
Counts transactions that were returned from outside the core cluster, hitting in the last.
level cache. This event counts when the system register CMECFG.EXTLLC bit is set.

CME_MEM_ACCESS.title: SME2 unit Data memory access
CME_MEM_ACCESS.description:
Counts memory accesses issued by the SME2 unit, where
those accesses are issued due to load or store operations. This event counts
memory accesses no matter whether the data is received from any level of
cache hierarchy or external memory. If memory accesses are broken up into
smaller transactions than what were specified in the load or store instructions,
then the event counts those smaller memory transactions.

CME_MEM_ACCESS_RD.title: SME2 unit Data memory access, read
CME_MEM_ACCESS_RD.description:
Counts memory accesses issued by the CPU due to load operations.
The event counts any memory load access, no matter whether the data is received
from any level of cache hierarchy or external memory. The event also counts
atomic load operations. If memory accesses are broken up by the load/store
unit into smaller transactions that are issued by the bus interface, then
the event counts those smaller transactions.

CME_MEM_ACCESS_RD_PERCYC.title: Number of outstandanding memory reads per cycle in the SME2 unit
CME_MEM_ACCESS_RD_PERCYC.description:
Counts the number of outstanding loads or memory read accesses per
cycle.

CME_MEM_ACCESS_WR.title: SME2 unit Data memory access, write
CME_MEM_ACCESS_WR.description:
Counts memory accesses issued by the SME2 unit due to store operations.
The event counts any memory store access, no matter whether the data is
located in any level of cache or external memory. If memory accesses
are broken up by the load/store unit into smaller transactions that are
issued by the bus interface, then the event counts those smaller transactions.

CME_REMOTE_ACCESS.title: Access to another socket in a multi-socket system due to the SME2 unit
CME_REMOTE_ACCESS.description:
Counts accesses to another chip, which is implemented as a different
CMN mesh in the system. If the CHI bus response back to the core indicates
that the data source is from another chip (mesh), then the counter is updated.
If no data is returned, even if the system snoops another chip/mesh, then
the counter is not updated.

CME_REMOTE_ACCESS_RD.title: Access to another socket in a multi-socket system due to the SME2 unit, read
CME_REMOTE_ACCESS_RD.description:
Counts read accesses to another chip, which is implemented as a different
CMN mesh in the system. If the CHI bus response back to the core indicates
that the data source is from another chip (mesh), then the counter is updated.
If no data is returned, even if the system snoops another chip/mesh, then
the counter is not updated.

MAX_POWER_THROTTLE_ACTIVE.title: Max power throttle cycles
MAX_POWER_THROTTLE_ACTIVE.description:
Count number of cycles in the SME2 unit during which Max Power mitigation mechanisms causes throttling
of the unit, impacting performance

TXDAT_LCRD_BLOCK.title: SME2 unit L3 TXDAT link-credit stall
TXDAT_LCRD_BLOCK.description: Count number of cycles stalls in the SME2 unit due to missing L3 TXDAT link-credit

TXRSP_LCRD_BLOCK.title: L3 TXRSP link-credit stall
TXRSP_LCRD_BLOCK.description: Count number of cycles stalls in the SME2 unit due to missing L3 TXRSP link-credit

TXREQ_LCRD_BLOCK.title: SME2 unit L3 TXREQ link-credit stall
TXREQ_LCRD_BLOCK.description: Count number of cycles stalls in the SME2 unit due to missing L3 TXREQ link-credit

DEADBLOCK.title: SME2 unit dataless evicts
DEADBLOCK.description: Count number of writeback evictions converted to dataless EVICT

SSVE_SLOW_INSTR.title: Slow Streaming SVE instructions
SSVE_SLOW_INSTR.description: Number of instructions which are considered as slow instructions (communication to the CPU, serializing instruction)

SSVE_GPR_UPDATE.title: Slow Streaming SVE instructions producing a General purpose register
SSVE_GPR_UPDATE.description: Number of instructions producing a GPR register (not XZR/WZR) from SME2 unit to the CPU

SSVE_PRED_UPDATE.title: Slow Streaming SVE instructions producing a predicate register
SSVE_PRED_UPDATE.description: Number of instructions producing a Predicate register from SME2 unit to the CPU

SSVE_FLAG_UPDATE.title: Slow Streaming SVE instructions producing condition flags
SSVE_FLAG_UPDATE.description: Number of instructions producing a Flag register (CPSR) from SME2 unit to the CPU

SSVE_CONTEXT_SWITCH.title: Context switch stall cycles
SSVE_CONTEXT_SWITCH.description:
Cycles inside the SME2 unit lost for context switch (new instructions are stalled in decode stage).

Counted for a core by the time arbitration acknowledge is sent to the time first instruction can be executed.

SSVE_FAST_CONTEXT_SWITCH.title: Stall cycles due to another Core accessing its context
SSVE_FAST_CONTEXT_SWITCH.description: Cycles inside the SME2 unit lost because a core loads or stores its context (without causing a real context switch).

CME_OP_DIVSQRT_ISSUE.title: SME2 unit Divide or Square Root operation issued
CME_OP_DIVSQRT_ISSUE.description: Count number of operations issued to a DIV/SQRT execution unit at each cycle.

SSVE_UNPRED_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Streaming SVE unpredicated
SSVE_UNPRED_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed data-processing, load, or store operation due
to an Streaming SVE instruction without a Governing predicate operand.

This counts the SME operations requiring PSTATE.ZA to be set.  It does not count Advanced SIMD operations.

CME_DRAM_ACCESS.title: Access to DRAM due to the SME2 unit
CME_DRAM_ACCESS.description: Counts access where the data was sourced from the DRAM.

CME_L1D_LFB_HIT_RW_FHWPRF.title: Level 1 data cache demand access line-fill buffer first hit, recently fetched by hardware prefetcher
CME_L1D_LFB_HIT_RW_FHWPRF.description:
The counter counts each demand access first hit in outstanding where the cache line was fetched by a hardware prefetcher.
Only the first hit by a demand access is counted.
After this event is generated for a cache line, the event is not generated again for the same cache line while it remains in the cache.

SME_INT_OTHER_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, other SME integer
SME_INT_OTHER_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation counted by SME_INT_SPEC due to an instruction which
reads from or writes to any part of the ZA array, which is not counted by SME_INT_DOT_SPEC,
SME_INT_MOPA_SPEC or SME_INT_MUL_SPEC

SME_FP_OTHER_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, other SME floating-point

CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL_PRFM.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache refill, software preload
CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL_PRFM.description:
Counts level 1 data cache refills where the cache line access was
generated by software preload or prefetch instructions.

CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL_HWPRF.title: SME2 unit Level 1 data cache refill, hardware preload
CME_L1D_CACHE_REFILL_HWPRF.description:
Counts each hardware prefetch counted by L1D_CACHE_HWPRF
that causes a refill of the Level 1 data or unified cache from outside of the
Level 1 data or unified cache.

CME_L3D_CACHE_PRFM.title: Level 3 data cache software preload due to the SME2 unit
CME_L3D_CACHE_PRFM.description: Counts level 3 cache accesses generated by software prefetches.

CME_L3D_CACHE_HWPRF.title: SME2 unit Level 3 data cache hardware prefetch
CME_L3D_CACHE_HWPRF.description: Counts level 3 cache accesses generated by hardware prefetches.

VPU_DP0_DUAL_ISSUE.title: Dual issue on DP0 issue queue
VPU_DP0_DUAL_ISSUE.description: Dual issue on DP0 issue queue.

VPU_DP1_DUAL_ISSUE.title: Dual issue on DP1 issue queue
VPU_DP1_DUAL_ISSUE.description: Dual issue on DP1 issue queue.

ASE_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Advanced SIMD
ASE_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by INST_SPEC that is an Advanced SIMD data-processing
operation. It does not count SVE operations counted by SVE_SPEC, or SME operations counted by
SME_SPEC.

INST_RETIRED.title: Operation retired
INST_RETIRED.description: Counts instructions that have been architecturally executed.

SIMD_INST_RETIRED.title: Operation retired, SIMD, including load and store
SIMD_INST_RETIRED.description:
The counter counts each retired SIMD instruction counted by INST_RETIRED.

This counter does not count scalar instructions counted by ASE_INST_RETIRED.

SIMD_INST_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SIMD, including load and store
SIMD_INST_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed SIMD operation counted by INST_SPEC.

This counter does not count scalar operations counted by ASE_INST_SPEC.

FP_SPEC.title: Floating-point operation speculatively executed, including SIMD
FP_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed floating-point operation due to an A64 scalar,
Advanced SIMD, SVE or SME instruction listed in SVE floating-point instructions.

FP_HP_SPEC.title: Floating-point operation speculatively executed, half precision
FP_HP_SPEC.description: Counts speculatively executed half precision floating point operations.

FP_SP_SPEC.title: Floating-point operation speculatively executed, single precision
FP_SP_SPEC.description: Counts speculatively executed single-precision floating point operations.

FP_DP_SPEC.title: Floating-point operation speculatively executed, double precision
FP_DP_SPEC.description: Counts speculatively executed double-precision floating point operations.

INT_SPEC.title: Integer Operation speculatively executed
INT_SPEC.description: Counts integer operations that have been speculatively executed.

ASE_SVE_INT_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Advanced SIMD or SVE integer
ASE_SVE_INT_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Advanced SIMD or SVE operation counted by INT_SPEC where the type is
integer.

SVE_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SVE
SVE_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by ASE_SVE_SPEC that is a scalable vector
data processing operation.

It does not count:

- SME operations counted by SME_SPEC.
- Neon operation counted by ASE_SPEC
- Load/store operations

ASE_SVE_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Advanced SIMD or SVE
ASE_SVE_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by SE_SPEC that is an Advanced SIMD or scalable vector
data processing operation.

It does not count:

- SME operations counted by SME_SPEC.
- Load/store operations

See ASE_SPEC and SVE_SPEC for these classifications.

SVE_PRED_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SVE predicated
SVE_PRED_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed SIMD data-processing, load, or store operation due
to an SVE instruction with a Governing predicate operand that determines the Active elements.

Note: this counts SME operations requiring PSTATE.ZA to be set, including 2D operations.

SVE_PRED_EMPTY_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SVE predicated with no active predicates
SVE_PRED_EMPTY_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed predicated SIMD data-processing, load, or store
operation counted by SVE_PRED_SPEC where all elements are Inactive.

That is, all elements in the Governing predicate are FALSE.

SVE_PRED_FULL_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SVE predicated with all active predicates
SVE_PRED_FULL_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed predicated SIMD data-processing, load, or store
operation counted by SVE_PRED_SPEC where all elements are Active.

That is, all elements in the Governing predicate are TRUE.

SVE_PRED_PARTIAL_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SVE predicated with partially active predicates
SVE_PRED_PARTIAL_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed predicated SIMD data-processing, load, or store
operation counted by SVE_PRED_SPEC that is not counted by either SVE_PRED_EMPTY_SPEC
or SVE_PRED_FULL_SPEC.

That is, the elements in the Governing predicate are neither all TRUE nor all FALSE.

SVE_UNPRED_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SVE unpredicated
SVE_UNPRED_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed SIMD data-processing, load, or store operation due
to an SVE instruction without a Governing predicate operand.

This counts the SME operations requiring PSTATE.ZA to be set.  It does not count Advanced SIMD operations.

SVE_PRED_NOT_FULL_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SVE predicated with no active or partially active predicates
SVE_PRED_NOT_FULL_SPEC.description:
Counts speculatively executed predicated SVE operations with at least
one non active predicate elements.

SVE_LDST_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SVE load, store, or prefetch
SVE_LDST_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed load or store operation counted by any
of SVE_LD_SPEC or SVE_ST_SPEC.

This includes Load/Store operations to Z register but does not count Load/Store operations to
ZT and ZA registers.

SVE_LD_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SVE load
SVE_LD_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed operation that reads from memory due to an SVE
load instruction.

SVE_ST_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SVE store
SVE_ST_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Speculatively executed operation that writes to memory due to an SVE
store instruction.

FP_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable floating-point element ALU operations speculatively executed
FP_SCALE_OPS_SPEC.description: Counts speculatively executed scalable floating point ALU operations.

FP_SCALE2_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable floating-point matrix element arithmetic operations speculatively executed
FP_SCALE2_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed scalable floating-point matrix arithmetic operation counted
by FP_SPEC.

The counter increments by the number of numerical operations carried out by the instruction per
128/element_size by 128/element_size tile of the result.

FP_HP_SCALE2_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable floating-point half-precision matrix element arithmetic operations speculatively executed
FP_HP_SCALE2_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Streaming SVE half-precision floating-point matrix ALU operation counted by
`SME_FP_SPEC` that was speculatively executed.

The counter increments by the number of numerical operations carried out by the instruction per
128/element_size by 128/element_size tile of the result.

FP_BF16_SCALE2_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable floating-point BFloat16 matrix element arithmetic operations speculatively executed
FP_BF16_SCALE2_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Streaming SVE BFloat16 floating-point matrix ALU operation counted by
`SME_FP_SPEC` that was speculatively executed.

The counter increments by the number of numerical operations carried out by the instruction per
128/element_size by 128/element_size tile of the result.

FP_SP_SCALE2_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable floating-point single-precision matrix element arithmetic operations speculatively executed
FP_SP_SCALE2_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Streaming SVE single-precision floating-point matrix ALU operation counted by
`SME_FP_SPEC` that was speculatively executed.

The counter increments by the number of numerical operations carried out by the instruction per
128/element_size by 128/element_size tile of the result.

FP_DP_SCALE2_OPS_SPEC.title: Scalable floating-point double-precision matrix element arithmetic operations speculatively executed
FP_DP_SCALE2_OPS_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each Streaming SVE double-precision floating-point matrix ALU operation counted by
`SME_FP_SPEC` that was speculatively executed.

The counter increments by the number of numerical operations carried out by the instruction per
128/element_size by 128/element_size tile of the result.

ASE_SVE_INT8_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Advanced SIMD or SVE 8-bit integer
ASE_SVE_INT8_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by ASE_SVE_INT_SPEC where the largest type is 8-bit
integer.

ASE_SVE_INT16_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Advanced SIMD or SVE 16-bit integer
ASE_SVE_INT16_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by ASE_SVE_INT_SPEC where the largest type is 16-bit
integer.

ASE_SVE_INT32_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Advanced SIMD or SVE 32-bit integer
ASE_SVE_INT32_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by ASE_SVE_INT_SPEC where the largest type is 32-bit
integer.

ASE_SVE_INT64_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Advanced SIMD or SVE 64-bit integer
ASE_SVE_INT64_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by ASE_SVE_INT_SPEC where the largest type is 64-bit
integer.

SME_FP_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME floating-point
SME_FP_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed floating-point operation counted by SE_SPEC due to an
instruction which reads from or writes to any part of the ZA array.

SME_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME data processing
SME_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by SE_SPEC that is an SME data-processing operation.
Operations due to the following instructions are counted as SME data-processing operations:

- Data-processing operations involving the ZA and ZT registers.

Operations due to instructions added by FEAT_SME which involve the SVE registers but do not involve any
ZA or ZT registers are counted as SVE data-processing operations.

SE_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Advanced SIMD, scalable vector extension, or scalable matrix extension data processing
SE_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by INST_SPEC that is an Advanced SIMD, scalable vector
extension, or scalable matrix extension data-processing operation.

See ASE_SVE_SPEC and SME_SPEC for these classifications.

SME_INST_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME
SME_INST_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation counted by SE_INST_SPEC that is classified as an
SME operation.

Operations due to the following instructions are counted as SME operations:

- Data-processing operations involving the ZA and ZT registers.
- Load and store operations involving the ZA and ZT registers.

Operations due to instructions added by FEAT_SME which involve the SVE registers but do not involve any
ZA or ZT registers are counted as SVE data-processing operations.

SME_INT8_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME 8-bit integer
SME_INT8_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed 8-bit integer operation counted by SME_INT_SPEC due to
an instruction which reads from or writes to any part of the ZA or ZT array.

SME_FP_BF16_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME BFloat16 floating-point
SME_FP_BF16_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed BFloat16 floating-point operation counted by SME_FP_SPEC
due to an instruction which reads from or writes to any part of the ZA array.

SME_INT16_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME 16-bit integer
SME_INT16_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed 16-bit integer operation counted by SME_INT_SPEC due to
an instruction which reads from or writes to any part of the ZA or ZT array.

SME_FP_HP_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME half-precision floating-point
SME_FP_HP_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed half-precision floating-point operation counted by
SME_FP_SPEC due to an instruction which reads from or writes to any part of the ZA array.

SME_FP_SP_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME single-precision floating-point
SME_FP_SP_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed single-precision floating-point operation counted by
SME_FP_SPEC due to an instruction which reads from or writes to any part of the ZA array.

SME_FP_ADDSUB_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME floating-point addition or subtraction
SME_FP_ADDSUB_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed floating-point addition or subtraction operation counted by
SME_FP_SPEC due to an instruction which reads from or writes to any part of the ZA array.

SME_FP_FMA_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME floating-point multiply-add or multiply-subtract
SME_FP_FMA_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed floating-point multi-vector multiply and accumulate, or multi-vector multiply
and subtract instruction counted by SME_FP_SPEC due to an operation which reads from or writes to any part
of the ZA array.

SME_FP_DOT_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME floating-point dot product
SME_FP_DOT_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed floating-point dot product operation counted by
SME_FP_SPEC due to an instruction which reads from or writes to any part of the ZA array.

SME_FP_MOPA_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME floating-point outer product and accumulate, or outer product and subtract
SME_FP_MOPA_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed floating-point outer product and accumulate, or outer product
and subtract operations counted by SME_FP_SPEC due to an instruction which reads from or writes to any part
of the ZA array.

SME_INT_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME integer
SME_INT_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed integer operation counted by SE_INT_SPEC due to an
instruction which reads from or writes to any part of the ZA or ZT array.

SME_INT_MUL_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME integer multiply or multiply-accumulate
SME_INT_MUL_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed integer multiply, multiply-add, or multiply-subtract operation
counted by SE_INT_MUL_SPEC due to an instruction which reads from or writes to any part of the ZA array.

SME_INT_DOT_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME integer dot product
SME_INT_DOT_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed integer dot product operation counted by
SE_INT_DOT_SPEC due to an instruction which reads from or writes to any part of the ZA array.

SME_INT_MOPA_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME integer outer product and accumulate, or outer product and subtract
SME_INT_MOPA_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed integer outer product and accumulate, or outer product and
subtract operation counted by SME_INT_SPEC due to an instruction which reads from or writes to any part of
the ZA array.

SME_PRED2_NOT_FULL_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME 2D predicated with at least one inactive element
SME_PRED2_NOT_FULL_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed predicated 2D SME operation which targets the ZA array
counted by SME_PRED2_SPEC where at least one element is Inactive.

That is, at least one element in the Governing predicates is FALSE.

For outer product instructions which are widening, predication is considered with respect to the input element
size.

SME_PRED2_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME 2D predicated
SME_PRED2_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed 2D operation which targets the ZA array counted by
SVE_PRED_SPEC due to an SME instruction with a Governing predicate operand that determines the Active
elements.

SME_PRED2_EMPTY_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME 2D predicated with no active element
SME_PRED2_EMPTY_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed predicated 2D SME operation which targets the ZA array
counted by SME_PRED2_NOT_FULL_SPEC where all elements are Inactive.

That is, all elements in the Governing predicates are FALSE.

For outer product instructions which are widening, predication is considered with respect to the input element
size.

SME_PRED2_FULL_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME 2D predicated with all active elements
SME_PRED2_FULL_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed predicated 2D SME operation which targets the ZA array
counted by SME_PRED2_SPEC where all elements are Active.

That is, all elements in the Governing predicates are TRUE.

For outer product instructions which are widening, predication is considered with respect to the input element
size

SME_PRED2_PARTIAL_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME 2D predicated with partially active elements
SME_PRED2_PARTIAL_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed predicated 2D SME operation which targets the ZA array
counted by SME_PRED2_NOT_FULL_SPEC where neither all elements are Active nor all elements are
Inactive.

That is, the elements in the Governing predicates are neither all TRUE nor all FALSE.

For outer product instructions which are widening, predication is considered with respect to the input element
size.

SME_LDST_ZAREG_SPEC.title: SME ZA unpredicated load/store
SME_LDST_ZAREG_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation that reads from or writes to memory counted by
SME_LDST_REG_SPEC that was due to an unpredicated instruction targeting the ZA array

SME_LD_ZAREG_SPEC.title: SME ZA unpredicated load.
SME_LD_ZAREG_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation that reads from memory counted by
SME_LDST_ZAREG_SPEC that was due to an unpredicated instruction targeting the ZA array

SME_ST_ZAREG_SPEC.title: SME ZA unpredicated store
SME_ST_ZAREG_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation that writes to memory counted by
SME_LDST_ZAREG_SPEC that was due to an unpredicated instruction targeting the ZA array.

SME_LDST_ZTREG_SPEC.title: SME ZT unpredicated load/store
SME_LDST_ZTREG_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation that reads from or writes to memory counted by
SME_LDST_REG_SPEC that was due to an unpredicated instruction targeting the ZT register

SME_LD_ZTREG_SPEC.title: SME ZT unpredicated load
SME_LD_ZTREG_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation that reads from memory counted by
SME_LDST_ZTREG_SPEC that was due to an unpredicated instruction targeting the ZT register

SME_ST_ZTREG_SPEC.title: SME ZT unpredicated store
SME_ST_ZTREG_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation that writes to memory counted by
SME_LDST_ZTREG_SPEC that was due to an unpredicated instruction targeting the ZT register.

SME_LDST_REG_SPEC.title: SME unpredicated load/store
SME_LDST_REG_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation that reads from or writes to memory counted by
SME_SPEC that was due to an unpredicated instruction targeting the ZA array or ZT register.

SME_LD_REG_SPEC.title: SME unpredicated load
SME_LD_REG_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation that reads from memory counted by
SME_LDST_REG_SPEC that was due to an unpredicated instruction targeting the ZA array or ZT register.

SME_ST_REG_SPEC.title: SME unpredicated store
SME_ST_REG_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation that writes to memory counted by
SME_LDST_REG_SPEC that was due to an unpredicated instruction targeting the ZA array or ZT register

SME_LDST_TILE_SPEC.title: SME predicated tile load/store
SME_LDST_TILE_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation that reads from or writes to memory counted
by SME_LDST_REG_SPEC that was due to an instruction with at least one governing predicate which is
targeting the ZA array.

SME_LD_TILE_SPEC.title: SME predicated tile load
SME_LD_TILE_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation that reads from memory counted by
SME_LDST_TILE_SPEC that was due to an instruction with at least one governing predicate which
is targeting the ZA array.

SME_ST_TILE_SPEC.title: SME predicated tile store
SME_ST_TILE_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation that writes to memory counted by
SME_LDST_TILE_SPEC that was due to an instruction with at least one governing predicate which
is targeting the ZA array.

SME_LUT_SPEC.title: Lookup table operation speculatively executed, SME
SME_LUT_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed LUT operation counted by SME_SPEC that returns a
value from a lookup table made up of a ZT register which is indexed by values from a Z register

cme_alu_port_utilization.title: SME2 Arithmetic EU Utilization
cme_alu_port_utilization.description:
This metric measures the average number of operations
executed by the ALU execution unit per cycle

cme_backend_bound.title: SME2 Backend Bound
cme_backend_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of cycles that were stalled due to resource constraints in the backend unit of SME2 unit.

cme_backend_core_bound.title: SME2 Backend Core Bound
cme_backend_core_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to DP issue queues not accepting instructions.

cme_backend_mem_bound.title: SME2 Backend Memory Bound
cme_backend_mem_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to Load-Store issue queues not accepting instructions.

cme_backend_mem_cache_bound.title: SME2 Backend Cache Bound
cme_backend_mem_cache_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend for memory resource constraints, with the oldest instruction in at least one of the LS issue queues waiting for cache arbitration.

cme_backend_mem_store_bound.title: SME2 Backend Store Bound
cme_backend_mem_store_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend for memory resource constraints, with the oldest instruction in at least one of the LS issue queues waiting for store buffer.

cme_backend_prefetch_bound.title: SME2 Backend Prefetch Bound
cme_backend_prefetch_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to hardware prefetcher issue queues not accepting instructions.

cme_bus_access_average_length.title: SME2 Bus Access Average Length
cme_bus_access_average_length.description: This metric measures the average length of bus accesses taken for all the bus requests made by SME2 unit

cme_frontend_bound.title: SME2 Frontend Bound
cme_frontend_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of cycles that were stalled due to resource constraints in the frontend unit of SME2 unit.

cme_frontend_cpu_bound.title: SME2 Frontend CPU Bound
cme_frontend_cpu_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the frontend due to frontend core resource constraints not related to instruction fetch latency issues caused by no instructions sent by CPU.

cme_frontend_other_bound.title: SME2 Frontend Other CPU Bound
cme_frontend_other_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the frontend due to frontend core resource constraints not related to instruction fetch latency issues caused by no instructions sent by another CPU.

cme_ipc.title: SME2 IPC
cme_ipc.description: This metric measures the number of SME2 instructions retired per SME2 unit cycles.

cme_iq_dp0_stall_percentage.title: IQ DP0 Stall Percentage
cme_iq_dp0_stall_percentage.description:
This metric measures the percentage of backend stall cycles
where at least one operation is waiting to issue to the
issue queue DP0, but it is full.

cme_iq_dp1_stall_percentage.title: IQ DP1 Stall Percentage
cme_iq_dp1_stall_percentage.description:
This metric measures the percentage of backend stall cycles
where at least one operation is waiting to issue to the
issue queue DP1, but it is full.

cme_iq_load_stall_percentage.title: IQ Load Stall Percentage
cme_iq_load_stall_percentage.description:
This metric measures the percentage of backend stall cycles
where at least one operation is waiting to issue to the
issue queue LD, but it is full.

cme_l1_prefetcher_accuracy.title: SME2 L1D Cache Prefetcher Accuracy
cme_l1_prefetcher_accuracy.description: This metric measures SME2 L1D cache prefetcher accuracy

cme_l1_prefetcher_coverage.title: SME2 L1D Cache Prefetcher Coverage
cme_l1_prefetcher_coverage.description: This metric measures L1D cache prefetcher coverage

cme_l1_prefetcher_timeliness.title: SME2 L1D Cache Prefetcher Timeliness
cme_l1_prefetcher_timeliness.description: This metric measures SME2 L1D cache prefetcher timeliness

cme_l1d_cache_hit_ratio.title: SME2 L1D Cache Hit Ratio
cme_l1d_cache_hit_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of level 1 data cache access hits to the total number of level 1 data cache accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the level 1 data cache.

cme_l1d_cache_miss_ratio.title: SME2 L1D Cache Miss Ratio
cme_l1d_cache_miss_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of SME2 level 1 data cache accesses missed to the total number of level 1 data cache accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the level 1 data cache.

cme_l1d_cache_mpki.title: SME2 L1D Cache MPKI
cme_l1d_cache_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of SME2 level 1 data cache accesses missed per thousand SME2 instructions executed.

cme_l3d_cache_hit_ratio.title: SME2 L3D Cache Hit Ratio
cme_l3d_cache_hit_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of SME2 level 3 cache access hits to the total number of level 3 cache accesses, requested by the SME2 unit.

cme_l3d_cache_miss_ratio.title: SME2 L3D Cache Miss Ratio
cme_l3d_cache_miss_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of SME2 level 3 cache accesses missed to the total number of level 3 cache accesses, requested by the SME2 unit.

cme_l3d_cache_mpki.title: SME2 L3D Cache MPKI
cme_l3d_cache_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of SME2 level 3 cache accesses missed per thousand SME2 instructions executed.

cme_ll_cache_read_hit_ratio.title: SME2 LL Cache Read Hit Ratio
cme_ll_cache_read_hit_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of SME2 last level cache read accesses hit in the cache to the total number of SME2 last level cache accesses.

cme_ll_cache_read_miss_ratio.title: LL Cache Read Miss Ratio
cme_ll_cache_read_miss_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of SME2 last level cache read accesses missed to the total number of last level cache accesses requested by the SME2 unit.

cme_ll_cache_read_mpki.title: SME2 LL Cache Read MPKI
cme_ll_cache_read_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of SME2 last level cache read accesses missed per SME2 thousand instructions executed.

cme_load_percentage.title: SME2 Load Operations Percentage
cme_load_percentage.description: This metric measures SME2 load operations as a percentage of SME2 operations speculatively executed.

cme_mac_port_utilization.title: SME2 MAC EU Utilization
cme_mac_port_utilization.description:
This metric measures the average number of operations
executed by the MAC execution unit per cycle

cme_mmdp_port_utilization.title: Matmul Datapath EU Utilization
cme_mmdp_port_utilization.description:
This metric measures the average number of operations
executed by the Matmul data path execution unit per cycle

cme_mmmv_port_utilization.title: Matmul Move EU Utilization
cme_mmmv_port_utilization.description:
This metric measures the average number of operations
executed by the Matmul move execution unit per cycle

cme_perm_port_utilization.title: Permute EU Utilization
cme_perm_port_utilization.description:
This metric measures the average number of operations
executed by the permute execution unit per cycle

cme_retiring.title: SME2 Retiring
cme_retiring.description: This metric is the percentage of cycles that were not stalled for any reason.

cme_st_port_utilization.title: Store EU Utilization
cme_st_port_utilization.description:
This metric measures the average number of operations
executed by the store execution unit per cycle

cme_store_percentage.title: SME2 Store Operations Percentage
cme_store_percentage.description: This metric measures store operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

cme_system_dram_mem_hit_ratio.title: SME2 System DRAM Hit Ratio
cme_system_dram_mem_hit_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of DRAM hits to the total memory accesses that missed in the private L1 cache of SME2 unit. This metric indicates that the workload is memory bound obtaining data from the local DRAM.

cme_system_l3d_cache_hit_ratio.title: SME2 System L3D Cache Hit Ratio
cme_system_l3d_cache_hit_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of L3 cache hits to the total memory accesses that missed in the private L1 cache of SME2 unit. This metric indicates that the workload is memory bound obtaining data from L3 cache.

cme_system_ll_cache_hit_ratio.title: SME2 System Last Level Cache Hit Ratio
cme_system_ll_cache_hit_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of Last level cache hits to the total memory accesses that missed in the private L1 cache of SME2 unit. This metric indicates that the workload is memory bound obtaining data from LL cache.

streaming_fp_op_percentage.title: Streaming FP Operations Percentage
streaming_fp_op_percentage.description:
This metric measures streaming floating point operations as a percentage of streaming
operations speculatively executed.

streaming_int_op_percentage.title: Streaming Integer Operations Percentage
streaming_int_op_percentage.description:
This metric measures streaming integer operations as a percentage of streaming
operations speculatively executed.

streaming_ld_op_percentage.title: Streaming Load Operations Percentage
streaming_ld_op_percentage.description:
This metric measures streaming load operations as a percentage of streaming
operations speculatively executed.

streaming_ls_op_percentage.title: Streaming Load/Store Operations Percentage
streaming_ls_op_percentage.description:
This metric measures streaming load and store operations as a percentage of streaming
operations speculatively executed.

streaming_op_percentage.title: Streaming Operations Percentage
streaming_op_percentage.description:
This metric measures streaming operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.
Streaming operations include Advanced SIMD, Scalable vector or
or Scalable Matrix extension data processing when the CPU is in streaming
mode.

streaming_slow_inst_percentage.title: Streaming Slow Instructions Percentage
streaming_slow_inst_percentage.description:
This metric measures streaming slow instructions as a percentage of streaming
operations speculatively executed.

streaming_st_op_percentage.title: Streaming Store Operations Percentage
streaming_st_op_percentage.description:
This metric measures streaming store operations as a percentage of streaming
operations speculatively executed.

za_fp_addsub_percentage.title: Streaming ZA Add Sub Floating Point Operations Percentage
za_fp_addsub_percentage.description:
This metric measures SME/SVE classified floating point addition or subtraction operations
that used ZA arrays as a percentage of all the SME floating point ZA operations speculatively executed.
za_fp_addsub_percentage.units: percent of streaming floating point ZA operations

za_fp_dot_percentage.title: Streaming ZA Dot Floating Point Operations Percentage
za_fp_dot_percentage.description:
This metric measures SME/SVE classified floating point dot product operations that used ZA arrays as a
percentage of all the SME floating point ZA operations speculatively executed.
za_fp_dot_percentage.units: percent of streaming floating point ZA operations

za_fp_fma_percentage.title: Streaming ZA FMA Floating Point Operations Percentage
za_fp_fma_percentage.description:
This metric measures SME/SVE classified floating point multiply-add, multiply-add long, multiply-subtract and
multiply-subtract long operations that used ZA arrays as a percentage of
all the SME floating point ZA operations speculatively executed.
za_fp_fma_percentage.units: percent of streaming floating point ZA operations

za_fp_mopa_percentage.title: Streaming ZA MOPA Floating Point Operations Percentage
za_fp_mopa_percentage.description:
This metric measures SME/SVE classified floating point outer product and accumulate, or outer
product and subtract operations that used ZA arrays as a percentage of
all the SME integer ZA operations speculatively executed.
za_fp_mopa_percentage.units: percent of streaming floating point ZA operations

za_fp_op_percentage.title: Streaming ZA Floating Point Operations Percentage
za_fp_op_percentage.description:
This metric measures SME/SVE classified floating point operations and used ZA arrays as a percentage of
all the SME operations speculatively executed that used ZA array.
ZA arrays are required for instructions that required PSTATE.ZA to be set.

za_fp_other_percentage.title: Streaming ZA Other Floating Point Operations Percentage
za_fp_other_percentage.description:
This metric measures SME/SVE classified floating point operations that used ZA arrays not
counted in any other category as a percentage of
all the SME floating point ZA operations speculatively executed.
za_fp_other_percentage.units: percent of streaming floating point ZA operations

za_int_dot_percentage.title: Streaming ZA Dot Integer Operations Percentage
za_int_dot_percentage.description:
This metric measures SME integer dot product operations that used ZA arrays as a percentage of
all the SME integer ZA operations speculatively executed.
za_int_dot_percentage.units: percent of streaming integer ZA operations

za_int_mopa_percentage.title: Streaming ZA MOPA Integer Operations Percentage
za_int_mopa_percentage.description:
This metric measures SME integer outer product and accumulate, or outer
product and subtract operations that used ZA arrays as a percentage of
all the SME integer ZA operations speculatively executed.
za_int_mopa_percentage.units: percent of streaming integer ZA operations

za_int_op_percentage.title: Streaming ZA Integer Operations Percentage
za_int_op_percentage.description:
This metric measures SME integer operations that used ZA arrays as a percentage of
all the SME operations speculatively executed that used ZA array.
ZA arrays are required for instructions that required PSTATE.ZA to be set.
za_int_op_percentage.units: percent of streaming SME operations using ZA tiles

za_int_other_percentage.title: Streaming ZA Other Integer Operations Percentage
za_int_other_percentage.description:
This metric measures SME integer operations that used ZA arrays not
counted in any other category as a percentage of
all the SME integer ZA operations speculatively executed.
za_int_other_percentage.units: percent of streaming integer ZA operations

za_op_percentage.title: Streaming ZA Operations Percentage
za_op_percentage.description:
This metric measures SME operations that used ZA arrays as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.
ZA arrays are required for instructions that required PSTATE.ZA to be set.

CME_Bus.title: SME2 BUS
CME_Bus.description: SME2 unit Bus transaction related events

CME_L1D_Cache.title: SME2 L1D CACHE
CME_L1D_Cache.description: SME2 unit L1 data cache related events

CME_L3D_Cache.title: SME2 L3D CACHE
CME_L3D_Cache.description: SME2 unit L3 data cache related events

CME_LL_Cache.title: SME2 LL CACHE
CME_LL_Cache.description: SME2 unit Last Level Cache related events

CME_Memory.title: SME2 MEMORY
CME_Memory.description: SME2 unit Memory system related events

CME_Retired.title: SME2 RETIRED
CME_Retired.description: SME2 unit Retired instruction and operation events

CME_Spec_Operation.title: SME2 SPEC OPERATION
CME_Spec_Operation.description: SME2 unit Speculatively executed operations related events

CME_IQ_Efficiency.title: SME2 ISSUE QUEUE
CME_IQ_Efficiency.description: SME2 unit Issue Queue Effectiveness related events

CME_Topdown_L1.title: SME2 unit Topdown Level 1
CME_Topdown_L1.description: This metric group contains the first set of metrics to begin topdown analysis of application performance on an SME2 unit, which provide the percentage distribution of processor pipeline utilization.

CME_Topdown_Frontend.title: SME2 unit Topdown Frontend
CME_Topdown_Frontend.description: This metric group contains a set of metrics to analyse a SME2 unit frontend bound code.

CME_Topdown_Backend.title: SME2 unit Topdown Backend
CME_Topdown_Backend.description: This metric group contains a set of metrics to analyze a SME2 unit backend bound code.

CME_System_Memory_Effectiveness.title: SME2 unit System Memory Effectiveness
CME_System_Memory_Effectiveness.description:
This metric group contains a set of metrics to analyze a system-bound code,
awaiting data from the system resources internal or external to the SME2 unit.

CME_General.title: SME2 unit General
CME_General.description: This metric group contains general metrics for SME2 unit performance analysis.

CME_MPKI.title: SME2 unit Misses Per Kilo Instructions
CME_MPKI.description: This metric group contains metrics for different SME2 unit resources that can be measured as misses per kilo instructions.

CME_Miss_Ratio.title: SME2 unit Miss Ratio
CME_Miss_Ratio.description: This metric group contains metrics to measure miss ratios of different SME2 unit resources.

CME_L1D_Cache_Effectiveness.title: SME2 unit L1 Data Cache Effectiveness
CME_L1D_Cache_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of L1 Data Cache on the SME2 unit.

CME_L3D_Cache_Effectiveness.title: SME2 unit L3 cluster Cache Effectiveness
CME_L3D_Cache_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of L3 cluster cache accesses from SME2 unit on this processor.

CME_Bus_Effectiveness.title: SME2 unit Bus Effectiveness
CME_Bus_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of bus accesses from the SME2 unit.

CME_LL_Cache_Effectiveness.title: SME2 unit Last Level Cache Effectiveness
CME_LL_Cache_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of Last Level Cache accesses from the SME2 unit on this processor.

CME_Operation_Mix.title: SME2 unit Operation Mix
CME_Operation_Mix.description: This metric group provides the distribution of micro-operation types executed by the SME2 unit for the program.

CME_IQ_Effectiveness.title: SME2 unit Issue Queue Effectiveness
CME_IQ_Effectiveness.description: This metric group provides relative stall cycles by operation type.

CME_Port_Utilization.title: Execution Unit Effectiveness
CME_Port_Utilization.description: This metric group provides relative utilization of execution pipes for the program.

CME_Prefetcher_Effectiveness.title: SME2 unit Prefetcher Effectiveness
CME_Prefetcher_Effectiveness.description: This metric group provides the SME2 unit prefetcher effectiveness metrics.
